example_prompt: Let a customer pay for a purchase in installments — for example, a phone in 3 monthly payments with an optional deposit.

startDate.description: Date of the first installment in YYYY-MM-DD format. Must be today or a future date.

nbrInstallments.description: Total number of installment payments. Required (unlike subscriptions which can be indefinite).

customerId.description: UUID of the customer making the purchase.

reference.description: Your internal order or purchase reference.

amount.description: Total purchase amount to split across installments. The installment amount is calculated as (amount - deposit) / nbrInstallments.

orderDetails.description: Line items of the purchase. Optional if amount is provided directly.

deposit.description: Optional upfront payment collected immediately (down payment). Remaining balance is split across installments. Default: 0.

customerMessage.description: Payment instruction sent to the customer with each installment reminder.

notificationChannel.description: How Bictorys notifies the customer before each installment. Default: email.

nextInstallmentDueDate.description: Date of the next scheduled installment charge.

customerName.description: Name of the customer enrolled in the plan.

currentInstallmentStatus.description: Status of the current installment: pending, succeeded, failed, etc.

gotchas: This endpoint uses the billing microservice. The base URL is https://api.bictorys.com/billing/v1 — not https://api.bictorys.com/pay/v1. Using the wrong base URL returns 404.
BNPL is for splitting a one-time purchase into installments (e.g. a phone in 3 payments). It is not for recurring services — use create_subscription_plan + create_subscription for that.

The deposit field collects an upfront payment immediately. The remaining balance (amount - deposit) is then divided equally across nbrInstallments. If no deposit is set, the full amount is split evenly.
nbrInstallments is required and must be a positive integer — unlike subscription plans which can be indefinite (no nbrInstallments needed).
Bictorys triggers installment charges automatically on each due date. You do not initiate them manually.
Sandbox base URL is https://api.test.bictorys.com — the production URL is https://api.bictorys.com.
